prompt.content:
Calculate the forecasted year-end FY2027-FY2029 share prices for the combined company RMBS and ONTO (including synergies) based on the following assumptions: 

- Use the corresponding closing share prices of the individual entities to compute the P/E ratios for the end of FY2023, FY2024 and Q3 2025.
- Leverage the average of the computed P/E ratios and EPS values of the combined entity to output the forecasted share prices. Round all outputs to two decimal places.
